visualizerParams.title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
visualizerParams.description: Find the maximum profit that can be made from a single buy and sell transaction of a stock.
visualizerParams.ghostCode:
def max_profit(prices):
    if not prices: return 0
    min_price = prices[0]
    max_prof = 0
    for price in prices:
        min_price = min(min_price, price)
        max_prof = max(max_prof, price - min_price)
    return max_prof

if __name__ == "__main__":
    prices = [7, 1, 5, 3, 6, 4]
    print(f"Max Profit: {max_profit(prices)}")
visualizerParams.finalCode:
def max_profit(prices):
    if not prices: return 0
    min_price = prices[0]
    max_prof = 0
    for price in prices:
        min_price = min(min_price, price)
        max_prof = max(max_prof, price - min_price)
    return max_prof

if __name__ == "__main__":
    prices = [7, 1, 5, 3, 6, 4]
    print(f"Max Profit: {max_profit(prices)}")
